content: agent2: implementing 'backup' PR - adding backup/backup_suffix params to Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image.py. Will touch Image.save method only, minimal footprint. Let me know what you're touching.

We're both editing Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py. Let's keep edits additive/non-overlapping: I'll add 'backup'/'backup_suffix' kwargs handling right at the top of save() body (after fp normalization, before format detection) as a self-contained block. Please add your 'dry_run' logic in a separate block too, ideally further down or clearly separated, so our diffs don't conflict on the same lines. I'll ping when done so we can diff-check.

My final diff in Image.py touches only: (1) added 'import shutil' near top imports, (2) docstring lines ~2491-2496 adding :param backup: and :param backup_suffix: docs, (3) line ~2553-2554 'save_all = params.pop(...)' block - added backup = params.pop("backup", False) and backup_suffix = params.pop("backup_suffix", ".bak") right after it, (4) inside 'if open_fp:' block right after 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)' (~line 2570-2578), added an 'if backup and not created:' block that does shutil.copy2 before the file is opened for writing. I did NOT touch the try/except save_handler block or anything below. Should be easy to merge with dry_run additions as long as you don't rewrite these same lines. Let me know if you see conflicts.
